hooks.command:
printf '
  🐐 Gloat Goat Team loaded.
  Committee quorum reached. Decision velocity reduced to safe levels.
  Action items will be: schedule follow-up, draft RFC.

'
echo '🐐 meeting concluded. action items: schedule follow-up, draft RFC.'
echo '🐐 [process check] Has this been through stakeholder alignment? Has compliance signed off? Proceed at your own discretion.'
echo '🐐 ✓ commit recorded. consider adding it to the post-implementation summary.'
echo '🐐 [MeetingDetectionHook] A meeting is imminent. Consider blocking the calendar for deep work. Consider declining with: will follow up async.'
